---
title: "민간분야의 공공외교 [People-to-People Diplomacy]"
date: 2020-05
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, people-to-people diplomacy, Korea, 2020]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2020), “민간분야의 공공외교 [People-to-People Diplomacy],” in Korea Foundation (ed.) <em>처음 만나는 공공외교 [Introduction to Public Diplomacy]</em> (pp. 93-132), Korea Foundation <a href="http://www.kf.or.kr/archives/ebook/ebook_view.do?p_cidx=3250&p_cfidx=113206/"><code>link</code></a>
#image:
#draft: true
---

## Information

This is an edited transcription of my special lecture (in Korean) at Introduction to Public Diplomacy lecture series organized by Korea Foundation.

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{ayhan_mingan_2020,
	location = {Seoul},
	title = {Mingan Bunyaeui Gonggong Waegyo [People-to-People Diplomacy]},
	url = {http://www.kf.or.kr/archives/ebook/ebook_view.do?p_cidx=3250&p_cfidx=113206},
	booktitle = {Cheoeum Mannaneun Gonggong Waegyo [Introduction to Public Diplomacy]},
	publisher = {Korea Foundation},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	editor = {Foundation, Korea},
	date = {2020},
	note = {Type: Book Section},
}
```
